https://secure-chasebank.com/login.aspx?.action_payload: CRITICAL ALERT: This URL mimics Chase Bank's login page to steal your credentials. Do not enter any information. Forward the link to phishing-report@uspis.gov and contact your bank immediately using the number on the back of your card.

https://relief.fema-gov.org/apply?claim_.action_payload: CRITICAL ALERT: This website impersonates FEMA disaster relief. It collects Social Security Numbers and banking details. Do not submit any personal data. Report to CISA at https://www.cisa.gov/report and the FTC at ReportFraud.ftc.gov.

https://bit.ly/3xAmPlK?utm_source=alert&.scam_type: Phishing Link - URL Shortener Tracking Malicious Redirect
https://bit.ly/3xAmPlK?utm_source=alert&.action_payload: WARNING: This shortened URL redirects through a known malicious tracker to a credential-harvesting page. Do not click. If you have interacted, scan your device with updated antivirus and change passwords immediately. Report to Action Fraud at 0300 123 2040.

https://paypaI.com/verify/account?token=.scam_type: Phishing Link - Homograph Attack Impersonating PayPal
https://paypaI.com/verify/account?token=.action_payload: CRITICAL ALERT: This URL uses a homograph attack (capital 'I' instead of 'l') to look like PayPal. It captures login credentials and financial data. Do not log in. Immediately change your PayPal password via the official app and report to TDRA at 800 12.

https://covid19-support.xyz/claim?benefi.scam_type: Phishing Link - Fake Universal Basic Income Relief Scam
https://covid19-support.xyz/claim?benefi.action_payload: WARNING: This site impersonates a government COVID-19 relief program, requesting personal and bank details for a fake universal basic income claim. Do not engage. If you have submitted information, contact your bank and local police immediately. Report to INTERPOL's cybercrime portal.

bc1qwqdg6squsna38e46795at95stuwr374rmk2v.action_payload: CRITICAL ALERT: This Bitcoin address is flagged by Chainalysis as a ransomware payment destination linked to Conti strains. Do not send any funds. Report the extortion attempt to your local cyber crime unit and the FBI IC3.

1HtGqcHk7RqQy8LokmNfRT5kLw3p6dVxW.scam_type: Crypto Wallet - Fake International Investment Pool (BTC Legacy)
1HtGqcHk7RqQy8LokmNfRT5kLw3p6dVxW.action_payload: CRITICAL ALERT: This wallet is tied to a fraudulent high-yield Bitcoin investment scheme. Victims are promised guaranteed returns but funds are stolen. Do not invest. If you have transferred funds, trace the transaction and file a complaint at ic3.gov.

0x742d35Cc6634C0532925a3b844Bc0e16e1f7b2.scam_type: Crypto Wallet - Impersonation Scam ETH Address
0x742d35Cc6634C0532925a3b844Bc0e16e1f7b2.action_payload: CRITICAL ALERT: This Ethereum address impersonates a legitimate crypto exchange support account, used in 'tech support' scams to drain wallets. Do not send ETH or tokens. Report to Action Fraud and the NCSC at report.ncsc.gov.uk.

0x53A0e9177c8B5c4E81cD7D9F9e6f5A2B345678.scam_type: Crypto Wallet - Fake Job USDT Laundering Mule Account
0x53A0e9177c8B5c4E81cD7D9F9e6f5A2B345678.action_payload: WARNING: This USDT (ERC-20) address is used by fake job scammers to recruit money mules. Receiving and forwarding funds can make you an accomplice to money laundering. Cease all contact and report to the Canadian Anti-Fraud Centre at 1-888-495-8501.

TXjG5vkKc4jbLgX1fxCKMHkDvFz3cDg9uL.action_payload: CRITICAL ALERT: This TRC-20 wallet is linked to a scam impersonating Qatar Investment Authority with fake crypto returns. Victims are directed via WhatsApp. Do not transfer any USDT. Report immediately to the Ministry of Interior cyber crimes hotline at 2347444.

+1-888-555-0199.scam_type: Tech Support Scam Call Center Number (Toll-Free US)
+1-888-555-0199.action_payload: CRITICAL ALERT: This number is used by offshore tech support scammers posing as Microsoft or Apple. They request remote access and demand payment in gift cards. Hang up immediately. Never grant remote access. Report to CISA and the FTC.

+44-800-123-4567.scam_type: Fake Job/Recruitment Scam Call Center Number (UK Toll-Free)
+44-800-123-4567.action_payload: WARNING: This number is associated with fake job offers requesting upfront fees for background checks or work-from-home equipment. Legitimate employers never ask for payment. Do not provide personal information or money. Report to Action Fraud with call details.

+1-844-206-2345.scam_type: Tech Support Spam Call Center Number (Toll-Free CA/US)
+1-844-206-2345.action_payload: CRITICAL ALERT: This number is part of a Canada-wide tech support scam claiming your computer is infected. Scammers use fear to gain remote access and steal banking details. Hang up and report to the Canadian Anti-Fraud Centre. Do not call back.

+971-800-1234.scam_type: Fake Bank Fraud Alert Call Center Number (UAE Toll-Free)
+971-800-1234.action_payload: CRITICAL ALERT: This UAE toll-free number impersonates local bank fraud departments. Callers trick victims into sharing OTPs and card PINs. Banks never ask for full PINs or OTPs. Do not disclose any digits. Report to Dubai Police eCrime platform.

+974-800-1234.scam_type: Job Scam Recruitment Call Center Number (Qatar Toll-Free)
+974-800-1234.action_payload: WARNING: This number runs a fake recruitment scam targeting Qatar residents with too-good-to-be-true job offers. They request passport scans and processing fees. Do not send documents or money. Verify jobs through official company channels and report to MoI Cyber Crimes.

upi://pay?pa=scam.merchant@okicici&pn=FR.scam_type: Malicious Payment String - UPI Deep Link for Tech Support Scam
upi://pay?pa=scam.merchant@okicici&pn=FR.action_payload: CRITICAL ALERT: This UPI deep link is pushed by fake tech support agents after gaining remote access. It instantly debits your account under the guise of a 'verification fee'. Do not approve the transaction. Disconnect remote access software and report to your bank and the FBI IC3.

intent://pay?merchantId=SCAM123456789&am.scam_type: Malicious Payment String - Android Intent Hijack for Fake Banking App
intent://pay?merchantId=SCAM123456789&am.action_payload: CRITICAL ALERT: This payment intent redirects to a counterfeit banking app designed to capture login and 2FA tokens. Do not complete the transaction. Uninstall any unknown apps and run a security scan. Report to INTERPOL's cyber crime portal and your bank.

swiftcode:SCAMUS33XXX:beneficiary:FAKECO.scam_type: Malicious Payment String - Fake SWIFT/Wire Transfer Instructions
swiftcode:SCAMUS33XXX:beneficiary:FAKECO.action_payload: WARNING: These wire instructions impersonate a legitimate UK corporate beneficiary. The IBAN and SWIFT code belong to a mule account used in invoice redirection fraud. Verify all payment changes via a known phone number. If you transferred funds, contact your bank immediately and report to Action Fraud.

https://verify-payment.xyz/secure?token=.scam_type: Malicious Payment String - Fake Payment Gateway Checkout
https://verify-payment.xyz/secure?token=.action_payload: WARNING: This link appears to be a payment verification page but redirects to a phishing site after capturing card details. It often arrives via SMS pretending to be a delivery service. Do not enter card data. If compromised, block your card and report to TDRA.

CCBILL:ZXY987654/INTL-HIGH-RISK/TRANSID=.scam_type: Malicious Payment String - High-Risk Merchant Routing Mask
CCBILL:ZXY987654/INTL-HIGH-RISK/TRANSID=.action_payload: SUSPICIOUS ALERT: This payment routing string is associated with an unregistered high-risk merchant used for processing fraudulent crypto-to-fiat transactions. Do not approve payments to this merchant. If you see this on a statement, report it to your financial institution and Chainalysis via your compliance team.
